---
title: "LASER"
page-layout: full
toc: false
filters:
  - home-loader.lua
---

::: {.laser-hero}
![](Info/Images/LASER_logo.png){height="80px" style="margin-bottom:0.5em;"}

# LASER

**Laboratory for Autonomous Systems Engineering Research**
Autonomous Learning · Modeling · Decision-Making · Validation · Process Systems Engineering

[About](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [Contact](about.qmd#contact){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [Join Us](about.qmd#join-our-lab){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

---

## Welcome to LASER

We are a research group in the Department of Chemical Engineering at Sunchon National University. LASER develops computational and experimental methods that make complex process systems **self-directing** — reducing reliance on manual expert iteration across design, operation, and validation.

---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-md-4}
::: {.laser-card}
### Research Focus

- **Autonomous Learning**: Sequential and Bayesian experimental design
- **Autonomous Modeling**: Hybrid digital twins, uncertainty-aware surrogates
- **Decision-Making**: Constrained optimization, robust and stochastic methods
- **Validation**: TEA/LCA-integrated workflow, monitoring, fault detection

[Learn more →](research.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-md-4}
::: {.laser-card}
### Recent Publications

::: {#recent-pubs}
:::

[See all publications →](publications.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-md-4}
::: {.laser-card}
### Quick Links

- [Research Areas](research.qmd)
- [Publications](publications.qmd)
- [Members](members.qmd)
- [About & Contact](about.qmd)

**Contact**: khryu@scnu.ac.kr
:::
:::

:::

---

:::{.callout-note}
## We're Recruiting!

We welcome highly motivated graduate students interested in autonomous systems engineering, process modeling and optimization, and data-efficient learning for complex engineering systems.

**[Learn how to join →](about.qmd#join-our-lab)**
:::
